personal_info.name: Lucas Maia e Silva
personal_info.title: Product Engineer / System Thinker / Senior Software Engineer

summary: Senior Software Engineer with strong background in front-end and full-stack development. Specialized in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. Experience building real-time, data-driven platforms such as trading dashboards for energy optimization. Strong focus on performance, scalability, and product-driven development. Postgraduate in Finance (Ibmec).

projects.title: TimberTech – AEM EDS Marketing Site (Multi-Brand)
projects.description: AEM Edge Delivery Services (EDS) block collection for TimberTech marketing site (deck/railing, B2B/B2C, multi-brand). Delivered reusable mobile carousel (JavaScript ES modules, CSS) with swipe, pagination, and media-text-split with image slider and video embeds (YouTube, Vimeo, MP4); mobile-first header and navigation; ecommerce and checkout blocks; video and hero enhancements. Supported multi-brand experiences (e.g. Lowes, Home Depot). Centralized copy via placeholders and config for easier updates and localization.

projects.title: Evident Scientific – EDS Site Rebrand & Design System Rollout
projects.description: B2B corporate website (EDS block-based). Drove design system rebrand across 15+ blocks (blog, hero, header, modal, product-details, video, etc.); enhanced search and results layout; improved product and fragment pages and video/modal UX. consistent rebrand, responsiveness, and accessibility (focus, overlay) on critical components.

projects.title: ADA Trading Dashboard – Real-Time Battery Storage
projects.description: Real-time trading platform for battery energy storage in the ERCOT market. Enabled 10 traders to make data-driven decisions via multi-axis charts (Plotly.js), dynamic bid/offer forms with capacity validation, and SSG/SSR caching that cut backend requests by 90%.

achievements: Built multi-axis chart system with Plotly supporting 3+ Y axes
Reduced backend requests by 90% using caching strategies
Created scalable bid/offer system with validation
Reduced code duplication by 60% via shared design system

projects.title: Gronda App and Web Experience
projects.description: Led UI/UX implementation across React Native mobile and Next.js web experiences, collaborating with design and backend teams to improve user experience and data reliability.

responsibilities: Worked on React Native app and Next.js web
achievements: Led migration from class components to React Hooks
Improved reliability of user data and roles

projects.title: Carat Control Center – Payments Dashboard & Statements
projects.description: Secure, compliant front-end for Fiserv's Carat global commerce platform—trusted by 70% of the world's leading brands. Delivered Control Center views for payment visibility and historical statements; co-led alignment with external component library team on props, events, and API contracts. Banking-grade UX under strict information security requirements.

achievements: Aligned component APIs with external design system

projects.title: Veloe – GraphQL Communication Layer
projects.description: GraphQL layer between backend and React/TypeScript frontend for Veloe (veloe.com.br). Addressed REST inconsistencies, over-fetching, and weak API contract. Reduced request volume by 30%+, ensured only required data was fetched, and improved frontend–backend reliability. Tests with Jest and Node tooling.

achievements: Reduced API requests by 30%+ using GraphQL
Built B2B dashboards with role-based access
Built UI for system with 13M daily users

projects.title: Oi Digital Experience Platform
projects.description: Frontend delivery for a high-traffic telecom platform with focus on performance and isomorphic architecture patterns.

career_highlights: Built trading platform used as primary tool by energy traders
Worked on systems with 13M daily users
